main.title: Sustainability
main.tagline: Every NOVVES Fan works for a cleaner
main.introText: At NOVVES, we invest not only in performance but also in the future. The high-efficiency operation of our fans not only saves energy but also significantly reduces carbon emissions. Our systems, manufactured with recyclable materials, offer long-lasting and environmentally friendly solutions.

sdgGoals.title: #11 Sustainable Cities and Communities
sdgGoals.text: Our energy-efficient fans contribute to the cities of the future. We reduce waste and use climate-friendly methods in every process from production to logistics.

sdgGoals.title: #12 Responsible Consumption and Production
sdgGoals.text: Our fans deliver more efficiency with fewer resources. By preventing overproduction and overconsumption, we support the reduction of harmful gases that cause global warming.

sdgGoals.title: #13 Climate Action
sdgGoals.text: Reducing the carbon footprint is our primary priority. Our products offer nature-conscious solutions with their long-lasting design and eco-friendly production. Acting with this awareness, we make concrete contributions in line with the Paris Climate Agreement and global climate targets.

co2.title: CO₂
co2.quote: Cleaning your air means protecting your future.
co2.introP1: NOVVES fans provide a concrete solution against carbon emissions by significantly reducing the energy consumption of businesses through high efficiency levels.
co2.introP2: According to 2024 data, while an average fan system produces thousands of kilograms of CO₂ per year, this value can be reduced by up to 40% with NOVVES systems.
highlights: Annual savings of ~38,461,538 TL in electricity costs (2.5 TL/kWh)
Approximately 9,050 barrels of oil equivalent energy savings
Longer fan life and more environmentally friendly operation
co2.contribution1: In systems operating with 10 MW installed power, annually
co2.contribution2: This provides a carbon reduction equivalent to approximately
co2.contributionText: At NOVVES, we aim to reduce environmental impact not only with our products but also with our production processes. We prioritize reducing the carbon footprint in all our decisions and base our logistics and operational processes on sustainability. Reducing carbon emissions is not just an environmental responsibility, but also a strategic step for future generations.

stats.label: annual savings in electricity costs (2.5 TL/kWh)

co2.ecoText: These savings both reduce your business's carbon footprint and enable you to invest in the future.
co2.quoteBottom: Energy efficiency is not just a cost factor; it is a responsibility for your company's continuity and the world.
howItems: Optimized performance from low turbulence and flow loss
Full compliance with EcoDesign and ERP standards

geriDonusum.title: Recycling
geriDonusum.subtitle: Taking Action for a Cleaner Future
geriDonusum.introP1: We don't just direct air; we take responsibility for the sustainability of nature.
geriDonusum.introP2: At NOVVES, we aim to reduce environmental impacts, conserve resources, and leave a livable world for future generations at every step from production to logistics.
geriDonusum.recyclingIntro: The United Nations' SDG 12 goal promotes responsible production and consumption through the prevention, reduction, recycling, and reuse of waste. At NOVVES, we align with this call by shaping our production processes according to recycling-oriented design principles.
geriDonusum.fanDetailText: NOVVES fans offer high recycling rates on a component basis. This minimizes energy usage while significantly reducing waste generation.
benefits: Green transformation in the production process
Raising environmental responsibility awareness among suppliers
geriDonusum.futureText: The production of the future must be efficient, circular, and nature-friendly. NOVVES is among the pioneers of this transformation.
geriDonusum.certText: With the Basic Level Zero Waste Certificate issued by the Republic of Turkey Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change on 08.04.2025, NOVVES's waste reduction, separation, and recycling processes have been officially certified.
geriDonusum.certSubtext: This certificate is at the center of our activities as an indicator of our responsible production approach.
